question_title: What will be the value of "Moody's Seasoned Aaa Corporate Bond Yield" on 2026-02-25?
summary: Moody's Seasoned Aaa Corporate Bond Yield (DAAA) has stabilized at 5.25% for the last 3 business days (Feb 13-18) after declining from 5.43% in early February. The underlying 20-year Treasury yield (DGS20) has also stabilized at ~4.65%. With a 5 business day horizon to Feb 25, I ran a bootstrap Monte Carlo simulation using 71 empirical daily changes from Nov 2025-Feb 2026. The empirical daily standard deviation is 0.032 with near-zero mean drift (-0.0006/day). Both bootstrap and normal simulations produce nearly identical distributions centered at ~5.25 with a standard deviation of ~0.07 over the 5-day horizon. The distribution is roughly symmetric around the current level, reflecting the stabilization pattern.

factors.description: Current value stable at 5.25 for 3 consecutive business days, suggesting recent decline has stalled
Underlying Treasury yield (DGS20) also stabilized at 4.63-4.65, confirming leveling off
Short 5-day horizon limits room for large moves; empirical daily std is only 0.032
Full sample mean daily change is essentially zero (-0.0006/day), no strong drift to extrapolate
Recent 10-day downward trend (-0.02/day) may have residual momentum despite stabilization

reasoning:
**Forecast: Moody's Aaa Corporate Bond Yield on 2026-02-25**

The yield has stabilized at **5.25%** for the last 3 business days after declining from 5.43% in early February. With only 5 business days until resolution, a Monte Carlo simulation using empirical daily changes produces a distribution centered near the current value:

| Percentile | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| 10th | 5.16% |
| 20th | 5.19% |
| 40th | 5.23% |
| 60th | 5.26% |
| 80th | 5.31% |
| 90th | 5.34% |

The distribution is roughly symmetric around ~5.25%, with modest uncertainty (σ ≈ 0.07) appropriate for the short horizon. The stabilization in both the Aaa yield and the underlying 20-year Treasury supports a forecast anchored near the current level.
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) What will be the value of "Moody's Seasoned Aaa Corporate Bond Yield" on 2026-02-25?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42207)
